title: Executive Order 12288—Termination of the Wage and Price Regulatory Program

flags.justification: A pure deregulation action revoking a prior order; no new authority is created.
No ongoing program is created by a termination of controls.
Single purpose: terminating the wage and price regulatory program.
Removes rather than creates a compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A one-time revocation grants no ongoing authority requiring reauthorization.
A substantive deregulatory action, not a removal of a review or check mechanism.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A routine deregulatory action with no elaborated broader effect in the text.
No second agency or mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (positive). Structural weight: 0/10 = 0.0%. Issued nine days into the Reagan administration, terminating Carter-era wage and price controls.
